svg.title: JVM Internal Architecture
svg.desc: Detailed structural diagram of the Java Virtual Machine showing ClassLoader subsystem, Runtime Data Areas, Execution Engine, and Native Interface.

g.text: Loads, links, and initializes .class files at runtime
Memory regions managed by the JVM at runtime

svg.text: Per-thread (each thread owns its own copy)

g.text: Interprets or compiles bytecode into native machine code
